Operation 'unsubscribe_contact' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Missing description entirely. Added context about authentication requirements, what the operation does (marks contact as unsubscribed), expected input (contact ID), return value (updated contact object), and important side effect (permanent unsubscription). This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose, prerequisites, and consequences.

data.description_suggestion: Unsubscribes a contact from email communications by their ID. Requires authentication via bearer token. The contact will be marked as unsubscribed and will no longer receive marketing emails. Returns the updated contact object with unsubscribed status. This action is permanent unless the contact is manually resubscribed.
data.reasoning: Missing description entirely. Added context about authentication requirements, what the operation does (marks contact as unsubscribed), expected input (contact ID), return value (updated contact object), and important side effect (permanent unsubscription). This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose, prerequisites, and consequences.
